records.review_gate: analytic reference, tolerance provenance, and CI artifact must all be present before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion against the retained analytic reference, tolerance provenance, and CI artifact

records.review_gate: two independent canonical cases must pass with documented tolerances
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion against the retained beam, frame, torsion, sign-convention, and boundary-regression evidence

records.review_gate: mesh and boundary evidence must be linked from the operator reliability entry
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion against the retained mesh, boundary, thermoelastic, heat-flux, and material provenance evidence

records.review_gate: field, flux, and stored-energy checks must pass across at least two orientations
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion against the retained field, flux, stored-energy, orientation, and material provenance evidence

records.review_gate: mode frequencies and ordering must remain stable under documented refinement
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion against the retained frequency scaling, mode ordering, restrained DOF, and normalization evidence

records.review_gate: Stokes-only screening scope must be backed by retained convergence or external-reference evidence before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained Stokes screening boundary scope, not for general CFD or Navier-Stokes claims

records.review_gate: scalar closed-form response, frequency scaling, and damping-loss evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 1D linear frequency-domain acoustic bar scope

records.review_gate: closed-form flux, Peclet scaling, and zero-velocity limit evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 1D steady constant-coefficient transport scope

records.review_gate: scalar permeance, material scaling, and zero-source energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 1D linear magnetostatic bar scope

records.review_gate: series stiffness, member force continuity, and zero-load energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 1D linear static spring-chain scope

records.review_gate: orthogonal vector stiffness, fixed-support displacement, member force, and strain-energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 2D and 3D linear static vector spring scope

records.review_gate: free thermal curvature, fixed-root response, zero-gradient limit, and near-zero internal-force evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 1D linear thermal beam free-curvature scope

records.review_gate: inactive gap, active penalty stop, penetration, and force-split equilibrium evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 1D penalty stop contact scope

records.review_gate: symmetric two-bar force balance, displacement, stress, strain, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 2D symmetric two-bar truss scope

records.review_gate: symmetric tripod force balance, displacement, stress, strain, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 3D symmetric tripod truss scope

records.review_gate: restrained uniform-temperature strain split, stress, axial force, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 3D fully restrained uniform-temperature thermal truss scope

records.review_gate: restrained uniform-temperature 2D strain split, stress, axial force, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 2D fully restrained uniform-temperature thermal truss scope

records.review_gate: restrained uniform-temperature 2D frame strain split, axial force, stress, zero-gradient, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 2D fully restrained uniform-temperature thermal frame scope

records.review_gate: restrained 3D frame strain split, thermal curvature, moment, combined stress, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification
records.promotion_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved promotion for the retained 3D fully restrained thermal-gradient frame scope
